info.title: AdaptIQ API
info.description: Adaptive MCQ backend with concept-level IRT and modular architecture

post.description:
Register a new user account.

1. Checks email/username uniqueness
2. Hashes the password with bcrypt
3. Creates the user row
4. Returns JWT + user profile

Authenticate user with email + password.

Returns JWT + user profile on success, 401 on failure.
Updates last_login timestamp.

Request a password reset OTP.

Always returns success (prevents email enumeration).
In dev mode, OTP code is printed to console.

Reset password using OTP code.

Validates OTP, checks max attempts (3), then updates password hash.

Promote a user to admin using a secret bootstrap key.

Only works if ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_KEY env var is set.
Used during initial setup — disable in production.

Generate an adaptive MCQ question using IRT-based difficulty targeting.

Two modes:
  - With session_id: get next question in existing session
  - Without session_id: start new session, return first question

The correct answer is hidden in the response (revealed on /answers submission).
Options are shuffled server-side for anti-cheat.

Generate a study hint for the current question via LLM.

The hint guides the user toward the answer without revealing it directly.
Falls back to a generic hint if the LLM service is unavailable.

Submit an answer and receive feedback, difficulty adjustment, and next question.

Server-side verification flow:
  1. Retrieve stored correct answer from session
  2. Map selected_answer to index (or use selected_index directly)
  3. Run IRT theta update + repeat-queue logic via ClassicService
  4. Return is_correct, correct_answer, explanation, next_question, session_stats

get.description:
Returns onboarding flags for the user.
Creates the flags row (with defaults) if it doesn't exist yet —
so calling this on first login is sufficient to initialise onboarding.

post.description:
Saves topic self-assessments and marks onboarding as completed.
Returns 409 if onboarding was already completed.

Marks onboarding as completed without saving topic data.
The guided tour will still show afterward.

Sets tour_seen = True.
Called when user clicks "Got it" on the last tour step, or skips the tour.

get.description:
System-wide dashboard statistics.

Returns counts of users, questions, sessions, concepts, and responses.

Most-tracked concepts by user engagement count.

Returns concepts ranked by number of users who have interacted with them.
Paginated list of all concepts with comprehensive stats.

Detailed view of a single concept with all tracking data.

Returns concept info, user mastery breakdown, tagged questions, repeat queue stats.

Detailed user profile with sessions and concept mastery.

Returns user info, their recent sessions, and concept tracking data.

patch.description:
Toggle user active/admin status.

Query params:
    is_active: Set user active status (true/false)
    is_admin: Set user admin status (true/false)

get.description:
Paginated list of all questions with optional topic filter.

Returns question text, topic, difficulty, and usage stats.

Combined session list across all room types.

Filter by session_type (challenge, custom, pvp) or get all.

Get system monitoring stats — request counts, errors, rate limits.

Uses the in-memory Monitoring singleton from services/monitoring.py.

post.description:
Join the PvP matchmaking queue.

Finds an opponent with similar Elo and shared concept knowledge.
Poll /queue-status to check if matched.

get.description:
Poll for matchmaking status.

Returns "waiting" if still searching, "matched" if opponent found.
Frontend should poll this every 2-3 seconds.

Get match details — returns only the current playable question and scores.

The correct answer is NOT included — it's revealed after each answer submission.
Future questions are intentionally hidden to prevent pre-reading.

post.description:
Submit an answer for a question in an active PvP match.

Validates the answer, updates scores, and checks if match is complete.

End a match and get final results with Elo changes.

Can be called by either player. Match auto-ends when both finish.

get.description: Get a user's PvP Elo rating and match history stats.
Get the PvP leaderboard — top players ranked by Elo.

AuthResponse.title: AuthResponse
AuthResponse.description: Signup/login success response — includes JWT + user profile.

AuthUserOut.title: AuthUserOut
AuthUserOut.description: User fields returned in auth responses.

BootstrapAdminRequest.title: BootstrapAdminRequest
BootstrapAdminRequest.description: Promote a user to admin using a secret key (dev/setup only).

ChallengeQuestionOut.title: ChallengeQuestionOut
ChallengeQuestionOut.description:
Extends the classic QuestionOut with challenge-specific fields.
correctAnswer is NOT returned to the frontend to prevent cheating.
The answer is verified server-side on submit.

DailyTrendPointOut.title: DailyTrendPointOut
DailyTrendPointOut.description: One day in the daily activity trend series.

ForgotPasswordRequest.title: ForgotPasswordRequest
ForgotPasswordRequest.description: Forgot-password payload — email to send OTP to.

JoinQueueRequest.title: JoinQueueRequest
JoinQueueRequest.description: Request to join the PvP matchmaking queue.

JoinQueueResponse.title: JoinQueueResponse
JoinQueueResponse.description: Response after joining the queue — includes queue entry ID.

LeaderboardEntry.title: LeaderboardEntry
LeaderboardEntry.description: Single entry in the PvP leaderboard.

LeaveQueueRequest.title: LeaveQueueRequest
LeaveQueueRequest.description: Request to leave the matchmaking queue.

MeOut.title: MeOut
MeOut.description: GET /me response — user profile + token issued_at timestamp.

PvPEndMatchResponse.title: PvPEndMatchResponse
PvPEndMatchResponse.description: Match results after both players finish or timer expires.

PvPMatchOut.title: PvPMatchOut
PvPMatchOut.description: Full match details returned to the frontend.

PvPQuestionOut.title: PvPQuestionOut
PvPQuestionOut.description: Single question in a PvP match quiz.

PvPRatingOut.title: PvPRatingOut
PvPRatingOut.description: User's PvP rating and match history stats.

PvPSubmitAnswerRequest.title: PvPSubmitAnswerRequest
PvPSubmitAnswerRequest.description: Submit an answer for a question in an active PvP match.

PvPSubmitAnswerResponse.title: PvPSubmitAnswerResponse
PvPSubmitAnswerResponse.description: Response after submitting an answer — includes correctness and scores.

QueueStatusResponse.title: QueueStatusResponse
QueueStatusResponse.description: Poll response for queue status — either still waiting or matched.

ResetPasswordRequest.title: ResetPasswordRequest
ResetPasswordRequest.description: Reset-password payload — email + OTP code + new password.

RoomLocksOut.title: RoomLocksOut
RoomLocksOut.description: Per-room lock state for the dashboard.

RoomProgressOut.title: RoomProgressOut
RoomProgressOut.description: Per-room progress percentages for the dashboard.

SignupRequest.title: SignupRequest
SignupRequest.description: Registration payload — email must be unique, password ≥ 8 chars.

UserRankOut.title: UserRankOut
UserRankOut.description: What the frontend reads to show rank badge + available levels.

UserStatsOut.title: UserStatsOut
UserStatsOut.description: Dashboard stats payload for the authenticated user.
